---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that does not work as documented
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear one-line description of the bug.

## Reproduction

1. Input used (project directory, zip, or PDF — attach or link a minimal example if possible).
2. Exact command line you ran.
3. Observed output (paste relevant lines from stdout / stderr; redact paths if needed).
4. Expected output.

## Environment

- `latex2ufdissertation --version`:
- Python version (`python --version`):
- Operating system + version:
- LuaLaTeX / TeX Live version (first line of `lualatex --version`):

## Additional context

Anything else that might matter: validator flag combinations tried, related rule IDs, recent changes to the input project.
